metrics.gates_first_pass_note: E2E notification tests needed addInitScript for Notification.permission mocking (FEATURE class)

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Seventh project type (SW notifications + UI components). 3-phase workflow completed. All gates passed after 1 fix cycle. 5 atomic commits.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: E2E gate caught that page.evaluate() after navigation doesn't update Svelte $state initializer — tests needed addInitScript before navigation. Also caught hidden checkbox (opacity:0) needing toBeAttached() instead of toBeVisible(). Both FEATURE class.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 instructions compliant. All verified with process + code checks. See retrospective for full audit.
